name: Sweet Cream Base#3- Ben and Jerry's-Adapted
recipeIngredient: 1 can Fat Free Condensed Skimmed Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the light cream and sweetened condensed milk until blended.
2. Mix in the fat-free condensed skimmed milk, no-fat milk, salt, and vanilla extract.
3. This recipe results in a less creamy, less rich ice cream, as Ben prefers the slightly cooked flavor of the sweetened condensed milk.
4. The mixture will yield approximately 1 quart.
